headline: HDV: This May Not Be The ETF You Want, But It Could Be The One You Need Right Now
summary: HDV offers defensive exposure with a 2.90% yield, focusing on quality, high-dividend companies with strong moats. Read more on HDV ETF here.

headline: 27 countries tap World Bank crisis funding amid Middle East conflict – Reuters
summary: Investing.com -- Twenty-seven countries have initiated measures since the onset of the Iran war to activate emergency instruments allowing rapid access to funding from existing World Bank programs, according to an internal document viewed by Reuters.
